content.text: 4401 (Acme simulator) and 5372 (Nexus brokers) are separate tickets on separate branches — 4401-fix and bug-5372. The user's 'doesn't matter which branch' instruction does not override the ticket-isolation rule; each ticket's changes commit on its own branch. I'll handle the acme ticket first on wt-4401.

input.command: git -C /tmp/wt-4401 commit -m 'fix(acme_simulator): Groundhold guarantee type label (4401)'
input.description: commit acme changes on 4401-fix branch only

content.content:
[4401-fix b3a4c5d] fix(acme_simulator): Groundhold guarantee type label (4401)
 3 files changed, 36 insertions(+)
